title: Someone Depends on You Now
scenario: Your family relies partly on your income. An advisor suggests a pure term insurance plan with a large cover for a small premium. Worth it?

choices.label: Skip it — insurance feels morbid
choices.lesson: Term insurance isn't about you; it's about the people who'd struggle financially without your income. If anyone depends on you, it matters.

choices.label: Buy a large, cheap term cover
choices.lesson: Term insurance gives a large payout for a tiny premium because it's pure protection. A rough guide is around 10x your annual income.
